judge_result.short_rationale: Answer includes unsupported and dangerous advice to drink large amounts of water or milk; source only supports drinking 200-300 ml of water. It also changes the priority by not leading with the no-vomiting instruction. Mouth rinse, no vomiting, and immediate medical care are present, but grounding is broken by the added milk/large-volume advice.
